summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dynamic Plan Management feature. All backend APIs (16/16 tests passed) and frontend UI features working correctly. Public plans API returns active plans from database. Admin can create/edit/delete plans with duration in days/weeks/months. Landing page pricing section displays plans dynamically. Candidate dashboard feature locking uses plan features from database.

minor.issue: Existing plans in database have 'duration_months' field instead of 'duration_value' and 'duration_unit'. New plans created via API use the new fields correctly. Public API handles both formats gracefully.

critical_code_review_comments: Public plans API (GET /api/resources/plans) correctly returns active plans with human-readable duration strings
Admin plans CRUD API properly validates duplicate plan_key and handles soft delete for plans with users
PlansManagement.jsx has proper form fields for duration_value and duration_unit (days/weeks/months)
Home.jsx pricing section fetches plans dynamically from /api/resources/plans
DashboardLayout.jsx fetches plan features and correctly locks/unlocks sidebar navigation based on user's plan
Feature locking works correctly - Free Trial users see lock icons on Peer Practice and 1:1 Coaching
Billing type toggle (One-time vs Subscription/Auto-renew) works correctly
Coaching sessions field properly displays in plan cards when > 0

test_credentials.free_trial_user: Click 'Start Free Trial' or 'Log in as Candidate' -> 'Free Trial User'

seed_data_creation: 6 plans exist in database: Free Trial, Pro Subscriber, Last Mile Prep, Mid Mile Prep, Full Prep, Cohort Program
context_for_next_testing_agent: Plan Management feature fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs: GET /api/resources/plans (public), GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/plans (admin). Frontend: PlansManagement.jsx for admin, Home.jsx pricing section for landing page, DashboardLayout.jsx for feature locking. Duration supports days/weeks/months units. Billing type supports one-time and subscription (auto-renew).

public_plans_api.details: GET /api/resources/plans returns active plans with duration string and features

admin_plans_api_auth.details: GET /api/admin/plans requires admin authentication (returns 401/403 without auth)

admin_get_plans.details: GET /api/admin/plans returns all plans with admin fields (plan_key, is_active, order)

admin_update_plan.details: PUT /api/admin/plans/{id} updates plan name, price, duration, badge, highlight

admin_delete_plan.details: DELETE /api/admin/plans/{id} removes plan (hard delete if no users)

new_plan_in_public_api.details: New plans created via admin appear in public API with correct duration string

landing_page_pricing.details: Home.jsx pricing section displays 3 plans dynamically from database

admin_plans_ui.details: Admin Plans section shows 6 plan cards with edit/delete buttons

admin_add_plan_modal.details: Create New Plan modal has all fields: name, key, description, price, currency, duration_unit, duration_value, billing type, coaching sessions, feature toggles, badge, order, highlight, active

candidate_feature_locking.details: Free Trial user sees lock icons on Peer Practice and 1:1 Coaching in sidebar

upgrade_cta.details: Free Trial users see 'Upgrade Now' CTA in sidebar

mocked_apis.payments: Razorpay payments are MOCKED (no API keys configured)
